---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(gbm)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(MASS)
library(mboost)
library(caret)
library(tidyr)

data <- read.csv("C:/Users/matth/OneDrive/Desktop/Books/Thesis/Data/freMTPL2freq.csv", header = TRUE)

df <- data %>%
  mutate(
    ClaimFreq = ClaimNb / Exposure,
    VehBrand = as.factor(VehBrand),
    VehGas   = as.factor(VehGas),
    Area     = as.factor(Area),
    Region   = as.factor(Region)
  )

set.seed(123)
train_index <- createDataPartition(
  df$ClaimNb,
  p = 0.8,
  list = FALSE
)
train <- df[train_index, ]
test  <- df[-train_index, ]

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Helper function: fit, CV, predict, clean
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
fit_glmboost_nu <- function(nu, train, test, mstop_max = 4500) {
  cat("Fitting GLMBoost with nu =", nu, "...\n")
  
  model <- glmboost(
    ClaimNb ~ VehPower + VehAge + DrivAge + BonusMalus +
      VehBrand + VehGas + Area + Density + Region +
      offset(log(Exposure)),
    data    = train,
    family  = Poisson(),
    center  = TRUE,
    control = boost_control(mstop = mstop_max, nu = nu)
  )
  
  folds   <- cv(model.weights(model), type = "kfold", B = 5)
  cv_risk <- cvrisk(model, folds = folds)
  best    <- mstop(cv_risk)
  final   <- model[best]
  preds   <- predict(final, newdata = test, type = "response")
  
  cat("  → Best mstop:", best, "\n")
  
  rm(model, folds, cv_risk, final)
  gc()
  
  list(preds = preds, best_mstop = best)
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Run all nu values sequentially
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
nu_values <- c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1, 0.25, 0.5)
results   <- list()

for (nu in nu_values) {
  results[[as.character(nu)]] <- fit_glmboost_nu(nu, train, test)
  gc()
}

# ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Extract predictions and best mstop values
# ─────────────────────────────────────────
test_pred_nu01 <- results[["0.01"]]$preds
test_pred_nu05 <- results[["0.05"]]$preds
test_pred_nu10 <- results[["0.1"]]$preds
test_pred_nu25 <- results[["0.25"]]$preds
test_pred_nu50 <- results[["0.5"]]$preds

best_mstop_nu01 <- results[["0.01"]]$best_mstop
best_mstop_nu05 <- results[["0.05"]]$best_mstop
best_mstop_nu10 <- results[["0.1"]]$best_mstop
best_mstop_nu25 <- results[["0.25"]]$best_mstop
best_mstop_nu50 <- results[["0.5"]]$best_mstop
```
